heading: Application of chapter to judgments
label: 3005 Application of chapter to judgments
text: This chapter shall not apply with respect to a judgment on a debt if such judgment is entered more than 10 years before the effective date of this chapter.
notes: References in TextFor effective date of this chapter, referred to in text, see , set out as an Effective Date note under .section 3631 of Pub. L. 101–647section 3001 of this title

Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , and applicable with respect to certain actions for debts owed the United States pending in court on that effective date, see , set out as a note under .Nov. 29, 1990section 3631 of Pub. L. 101–647section 3001 of this title
